name: quioteframework/session-azure
description: Azure Blob Storage and Table Storage session backends for Quiote — SessionPersistenceInterface implementations for SessionManager, backed by minimal Shared-Key REST clients (no official SDK dependency).

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/session-azure/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
